positive: A detailed, whimsical illustration of a forest floor at twilight. Glowing bioluminescent mushrooms illuminate giant, stylized ferns and a small, sleeping fox. Watercolor and ink style, highly saturated colors, magical realism, clean lines, perfect symmetry.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, grayscale, muddy colors, noise, noise, grain
